ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the individual */,
  "suffix" TEXT /* Suffix of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the individual */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the individual */,
  "is_deceased" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the individual is deceased */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode where the individual resides */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the individual */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_ethnicity FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region associated with the ethnicity */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the ethnicity */,
  "cultural_practices" TEXT /* Cultural practices of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender identity */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender identity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zipcodes" (
  "zipcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zipcode entry */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode representing a geographical area */,
  "city" TEXT /* City corresponding to the zipcode */,
  "state" TEXT /* State corresponding to the zipcode */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zipcode */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zipcode */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode of the household */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the household */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., nuclear, extended) */,
  "income_total" REAL /* Total household income */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., single-family home, apartment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_household" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consent_preferences" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates whether consent is given (true/false) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was granted */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., data sharing, contact) */,
  "consent_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent expires */,
  "consent_withdrawn_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent was withdrawn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consent_preferences_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, health outcomes) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "report_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
